story_angle: investigative exposé uncovering a hidden scandal
headline: The Grain Guild's Betrayal: A Harvest of Deceit
deck: An exposé unveils the nefarious dealings of the Imperial Grain Guild, as noble families conspire to inflate grain prices amidst the suffering of the peasantry.
article:
In the year of our Lord 1347, as the snows melt and the fields awaken, a blight not of nature but of man has taken root within the hallowed halls of the Imperial Grain Guild. This once-revered institution, tasked with the sacred duty of ensuring sustenance for the Empire, has become a den of corruption, infested with greed and deceit. Evidence suggests a collusion most foul between the Guild's leaders and noble houses, as they conspire to inflate grain prices, leaving the common folk to suffer the bitter pangs of hunger.

Testimonies from starving peasants echo through the land, painting a grim portrait of despair. One such voice, a widow from the impoverished hamlet of Verenthia, laments, "Our children cry for bread, yet the Guild hoards the grain, filling their coffers while we wither. How can the Empire stand righteous, when it allows the starving to be trodden underfoot by the wealthy?" Such sorrowful accounts illuminate a populace desperate for justice, while the gilded nobility revel in their ill-gotten gains.

In a twist of fate befitting the darkest tales of yore, secret documents have surfaced, revealing to what depths the Guild has sunk. These texts not only implicate their leaders in collusion with the noble classes but also disclose treasonous dealings with foreign merchants. It appears that grain, the lifeblood of our great Empire, has been bartered for the favor of rivals, undermining the very foundation upon which our civilization stands.

As the Empire grapples with the truth of this treachery, the specter of famine looms ever larger over its people. The shadow of divine providence may yet shine upon the innocent, urging a reckoning against those who would pervert the natural order for greed. In this most critical hour, the Imperial Senate must take heed of the suffering souls and purge this corruption from the grain that feeds our land. For without justice, how can we call ourselves an Empire worthy of the heavens?
author: Local Editor

oped.title: Hail the Hoarders
oped.author: Flavia Severa, Exiled Scribe
oped.body: The Grain Guild stands accused of deceit while Rome’s endless legions march on phantom grain. In this Empire that refuses to die, betrayal is the only honest harvest. Without their stockpiles, the Senate’s marble tables would lie bare and the mob would finally taste the rot beneath eternal glory. Cry treason all you like; the true scandal is our centuries-long appetite for the lie that abundance flows from virtue rather than from men willing to starve their neighbors. 1347 years of this farce, and still we pretend the fields belong to the living.

classifieds.text: Join the prosperous trade routes of the Eternal City! Seeking skilled artisans to craft goods of fine quality. Gold and glory await those who answer the call. Inquire at the Forum of Augustus.
Valiant knights of the realm! The Ducal House of Carthago is in need of brave souls to protect our lands from marauding brigands. Generous rewards and noble titles offered. Apply at the Castle Gates.

Herbalists, healers, and wise women! The Temple of Asclepius seeks your expertise. Help our citizens with their ailments and be compensated with fine silks and spices. Visit us at the Healing Pavilion!

To all skilled smiths and craftsmen! The Coliseum needs magnificent creations for the upcoming games. Show off your artistry and gain favor in the eyes of the Senate. Contact a messenger to submit your designs!

panels.caption: Guildmaster stamps the ledger: "Prices tripled on 'strategic shortage.'"
Noble whispers to aide: "Tell the serfs it's divine will. My new stables need thatch."
Peasant to child: "At least the Guild leaves us the husks. For soup."

joke.setup: The Grain Guild assured the Senate their silos stood loyal to the Emperor's table,
joke.punchline: yet the only thing they reaped was a tidy profit selling Rome's bread to whoever paid in silver before the plebs noticed.
joke.text: The Grain Guild assured the Senate their silos stood loyal to the Emperor's table, yet the only thing they reaped was a tidy profit selling Rome's bread to whoever paid in silver before the plebs noticed.

sponsor_ads.headline: Behold! The Unyielding Harvest Helmet!
sponsor_ads.body: Tired of thieving scarecrows pilfering your bushels? Our enchanted helmets repel all chicanery—guaranteed to render your grain secure or your wheat sown in salt! Limited supplies available.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Warning: May cause sudden fits of wisdom or bizarre accents.

sponsor_ads.headline: Join the Grain Guild and Get Betrayed Today!
sponsor_ads.body: Sign up now for a lifetime of deceit and betrayal! Receive a free dagger for every shipment of promised corn that never arrives! Membership is non-refundable and comes with a complimentary frown.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Terms and conditions apply; betrayal may vary.

sponsor_ads.headline: Want to Spite the Guild? Try Our Odoriferous Onions!
sponsor_ads.body: These rare and pungent bulbs were harvested by disgruntled farmers seeking revenge. Place one in your grain store to ensure the Guild never approaches! 100% stink guaranteed.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not responsible for any vengeful spirits or volatile relationships.

sponsor_ads.headline: The Unfathomable Scribe: Whispers of Doom
sponsor_ads.body: For a mere two groats, obtain a personalized scroll detailing the most peculiar omens concerning the Grain Guild. Spoiler alert: it's mostly bad news! Ideal for those seeking foresight in a pigeon's droppings.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not liable for any misinterpretation of omens; scroll at your own risk.
